stack: Split-Type 0.3.4 (loaded, barely used — custom .tricks word/letter split instead)
Three.js r128 (loaded, no usage found on homepage)

animations.desc: Intro loader: logo fade/slide, color flash sequence, slide-up exit; once via localStorage loaderPlayed; then calls myFade()
Smooth scroll (duration 1.2, expo-like easing)
myFade(): ScrollTrigger stagger for [fade-up], [fade-nav], [fade-left/right], .tricksword, .divider
Custom split of .tricks → .tricksword → .letter (not SplitType API)
Navbar logo opacity 0 after 5% page scroll
GSAP hover expand/color swap on .button__contact__nav
Document title → '👋 Pssssht!' when tab hidden
Swiper loop + GSAP morph of first review card into carousel on scroll
Adobe/Novum/Behance/Awwwards cards: random stagger scale 0.5→1 on scroll
Hover swaps founder photos (hungry/happy/face/target)
Magnetic button .button-video-stuck (elastic pull) + expand video on click
Same arrow-width hover as contact button
.button__gradient__item expand blur→full + toggle slide
Tag list shuffle/stagger in-out when switching services
Service logos fly up from y:22.9rem with random rotation unwind
.gradient-blur-bg infinite sine drift + scale yoyo
Desktop hover expand video cards Be true/strong/bold with random video pick
Dropdown blur + staggered items (hover desktop / click mobile)
Webflow Lottie in hero, scroll-triggered via .lottie-trigger (IX2)
Webflow Interactions: swap H1 Activez/Réveillez + paragraph color on scroll (data-w-id)
Webflow IX: FAQ answer height 0→auto, icon rotate, gradient slide-in
Autoplay looping background videos in Be true/strong/bold sections + showreel
CSS transition on .button-icon gradient-bg translate on hover
Webflow shared.css @keyframes spin (spinner utility)

notes: data-barba attributes present but @barba/core is NOT loaded on homepage — page transitions incomplete/legacy
Three.js is loaded but unused on homepage
